objective: verify all 5 Ring 5 launch gates — Stripe live, DNS, YubiKey slot 2, launch sequence

ops.description: NS service live — prerequisite for ring5/status
system baseline: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, NSExternal mount, ns_memory.json
live Ring 5 gate check — 5 gates: stripe_llc_verified, stripe_live_keys, yubikey_slot2, dns_cname_root, launch_sequence_executed
NSExternal SSD mount verified — required for receipt chain and LAUNCH_EXECUTED marker
YubiKey quorum status — slot_1 active, slot_2 pending
shalom score — confirm system integrity before launch gate decisions

note: launch_ready=false is expected until all 5 Ring 5 manual steps complete. Check results[3].data.body.gates for per-gate status.

ring5_gates.stripe_llc_verified: Upload AXIOLEV Holdings LLC EIN + articles to Stripe dashboard → live mode
ring5_gates.stripe_live_keys: Replace STRIPE_SK_PENDING with sk_live_... key in .env + Vercel env vars
ring5_gates.yubikey_slot2: Procure 2nd YubiKey 5 NFC → enroll via POST /kernel/yubikey/provision
